Home Tours Attractions Regions Food & Culture About Contact

Central Highlands

Mountainous heartland including Kabul, Bamyan, and the historic corridors linking north and south.

Plan a Visit
Provinces

Provinces of Central Highlands

Bamyan

The crown jewel of Afghan tourism, home to UNESCO Buddhas and sapphire lakes.

Daykundi

A rugged, high-altitude landscape of almond blossoms and Hazara hospitality.

Ghazni

An ancient imperial capital filled with crumbling minarets and Ghaznavid history.

Kabul

The frantic, historic, and resilient capital city at the crossroads of Asia.

Kapisa

A fertile valley of citrus groves and ancient Buddhist monastery ruins.

Logar

Gateway to the south and home to the world’s most significant copper-age ruins.

Panjshir

The legendary Five Lions valley of emerald mines and resistance history.

Parwan

Home to the engineering marvel of the Salang Pass and lush hillside gardens.

Wardak

A high-altitude gateway of nomadic pastures and dramatic mountain passes.

Highlights

Attractions in Central Highlands

Ancient Civilizations

Buddha Niches of Bamyan

Iconic Silk Road cultural giants.

Bamyan

Ancient Civilizations

Shahr-e-Gholghola

The haunting 'City of Screams' ruins.

Bamyan

Ancient Civilizations

Shahr-e-Zohak

The dramatic 'Red City' mountain fortress.

Bamyan

Nature & Adventure

Band-e-Amir National Park

Stunning sapphire-blue travertine lakes.

Bamyan

Nature & Adventure

Koh-e-Baba Mountain Range

The snowy spine of the Central Highlands.

Bamyan

Nature & Adventure

Dragon Valley

Nature's petrified 'Dragon' ridge.

Bamyan

Rural

Daykundi Highlands

Terraced valleys and almond blossoms.

Daykundi

Ancient Civilizations

Ghazni Minarets

Ornate 12th-century victory towers.

Ghazni

Landmarks

Bala Hisar of Ghazni

The historic high citadel of the south.

Ghazni

Spiritual & Religious

Tomb of Sultan Mahmud

Resting place of a medieval world-conqueror.

Ghazni

Ancient Civilizations

Tapa Sardar

Remains of a massive hilltop stupa.

Ghazni

Ancient Civilizations

Palace of Sultan Mas'ud III

Ruined grandeur of the Ghaznavid court.

Ghazni

Landmarks

Darulaman Palace

Iconic symbol of national resilience.

Kabul

Landmarks

Kabul National Museum

Treasury of Afghanistan's ancient past.

Kabul

Landmarks

Babur's Gardens

Terraced Mughal paradise in Kabul.

Kabul

Spiritual & Religious

Shah-e-Du Shamshira Mosque

The unique 'Mosque of Two Swords'.

Kabul

Spiritual & Religious

Sakhi Shrine

A vivid blue beacon of Kabul's faith.

Kabul

Urban

Wazir Akbar Khan Hill

The best panoramic viewpoint in Kabul.

Kabul

Bazaars & Artisans

Chicken Street

Kabul's legendary antiques market.

Kabul

Nature & Adventure

Qargha Lake

Kabul's favorite weekend lakeside escape.

Kabul

Urban

TV Tower Hill (Mount Asmai)

A high-altitude gaze over the city.

Kabul

Landmarks

Bala Hissar

Kabul's ancient hilltop 'High Fortress'.

Kabul

Urban

Kabul Zoo

A resilient center of family life.

Kabul

Landmarks

Taq-e-Zafar Paghman

European-style arch in a mountain retreat.

Kabul

Bazaars & Artisans

Murad Khane

Beautifully restored timber-framed old city.

Kabul

Landmarks

Tape Nader Khan

Royal mausoleums on a quiet hill.

Kabul

Bazaars & Artisans

Kahfroshi Bird Market

A sensory journey through the bird bazaar.

Kabul

Urban

Ghazi Olympic Stadium

The heart of Afghan sports and football.

Kabul

Landmarks

OMAR Landmine Museum

Ancient Civilizations

Khurd-Kabul Pass

Dramatic mountain pass of military legend.

Kabul

Nijrab Valley

Lush terraced hills and river springs.

Logar Valleys

Ahmad Shah Massoud Mausoleum

Paryan Valley

Pristine alpine trekking and river headwaters.

Salang Pass

The high-altitude gateway to the north.

Jabal Saraj Palace

Royal-era fortress at the foot of the pass.

Wardak Highlands

Discover the breathtaking landscapes, ancient history, and rich culture of Afghanistan with our expert-guided tours.
